summary: Turn Mentor Dashboard summary metrics into real focus shortcuts so assigned-student revision, meeting, and presentation priorities open the existing mentor-scoped filters instead of staying summary-only.
selectedReason: Current repo evidence showed that workspace.js already exposed the exact mentor focus filters and URL-state sync for all, revision, meeting, and presentation views, but the top Assigned, Needs Revision, Meetings, and Presentations tiles still acted as summary-only affordances above the same list. Reusing the existing in-section mentor filter path was the safest high-value slice because it improved mentor workflow clarity without adding routes, broadening permissions, or changing data scope.

candidates.decision: deferred: broader navigation batch than this mentor-focused shortcut slice
deferred: no exact current destination is proven for that follow-up row
deferred: hosted runtime is outside this local batch
deferred: backend queue rows are still absent
deferred: mutation and audit design still needed
deferred: browser runtime proof is outside this local batch
not selected: broader visual surface than this mentor workflow slice
not selected: lower current pain than the mentor dashboard shortcut gap

nextRecommended: Inspect a role-safe global search landing that reuses the current Student Directory search filters before introducing any broader navigation surface.
doNotRepeat: Do not turn Mentor Dashboard summary metrics back into summary-only tiles while the existing mentor focus filters still back them.
Do not broaden mentor access beyond actively assigned students while improving Mentor Dashboard shortcuts.
Do not replace these in-page mentor shortcuts with a new route when the current mentor filter state already solves the workflow.
